benefits.description: Testosterone increased approximately 50% higher than baseline, sustained two months after completion of peptide course

protocol_notes: Khavinson peptides (organ-extracted from calves) taken sublingually for approximately one month. Multiple peptides used including testicle-derived peptide and three others; synergistic effects suspected. No other lifestyle changes (diet, lifting) during the protocol. Blood work done approximately two months after completing peptide course.
